title: Firefighters
description: Control and extinguish fires or respond to emergency situations where life, property, or the environment is at risk. Duties may include fire prevention, emergency medical service, hazardous material response, search and rescue, and disaster assistance.

tasks.text: Rescue survivors from burning buildings, accident sites, and water hazards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Dress with equipment such as fire-resistant clothing and breathing apparatus.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Assess fires and situations and report conditions to superiors to receive instructions, using two-way radios.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Move toward the source of a fire, using knowledge of types of fires, construction design, building materials, and physical layout of properties.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Respond to fire alarms and other calls for assistance, such as automobile and industrial accidents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Create openings in buildings for ventilation or entrance, using axes, chisels, crowbars, electric saws, or core cutters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Drive and operate fire fighting vehicles and equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect fire sites after flames have been extinguished to ensure that there is no further danger.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Position and climb ladders to gain access to upper levels of buildings, or to rescue individuals from burning structures.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Select and attach hose nozzles, depending on fire type, and direct streams of water or chemicals onto fires.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate pumps connected to high-pressure hoses.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain contact with fire dispatchers at all times to notify them of the need for additional firefighters and supplies, or to detail any difficulties encountered.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with other firefighters as a member of a firefighting crew.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Patrol burned areas after fires to locate and eliminate hot spots that may restart fires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Collaborate with police to respond to accidents, disasters, and arson investigation calls.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in fire drills and demonstrations of fire fighting techniques.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare written reports that detail specifics of fire incidents.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Maintain knowledge of current firefighting practices by participating in drills and by attending seminars, conventions, and conferences.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in physical training activities to maintain a high level of physical fitness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Protect property from water and smoke, using waterproof salvage covers, smoke ejectors, and deodorants.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inform and educate the public on fire prevention.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Salvage property by removing broken glass, pumping out water, and ventilating buildings to remove smoke.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Orient self in relation to fire, using compass and map, and collect supplies and equipment dropped by parachute.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean and maintain fire stations and fire fighting equipment and apparatus.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect buildings for fire hazards and compliance with fire prevention ordinances, testing and checking smoke alarms and fire suppression equipment as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Take action to contain any hazardous chemicals that could catch fire, leak, or spill.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Extinguish flames and embers to suppress fires, using shovels or engine- or hand-driven water or chemical pumps.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer first aid and cardiopulmonary resuscitation to injured persons or provide emergency medical care such as basic or advanced life support.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Search to locate fire survivors.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train new employees to control and suppress fires.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
